tldr_explicit.prompt: tl;dr this: The quarterly report indicates revenue grew 12% to 4.2M, while headcount stayed flat at 45. Churn ticked up to 3.1% from 2.8%, which the team attributes to the March pricing change.

tldr_natural.prompt: can you shorten this down for me? The quarterly report indicates revenue grew 12% to 4.2M, while headcount stayed flat at 45. Churn ticked up to 3.1% from 2.8%, which the team attributes to the March pricing change.

tldr_summarize.prompt: summarize: The quarterly report indicates revenue grew 12% to 4.2M, while headcount stayed flat at 45. Churn ticked up to 3.1% from 2.8%, attributed to the March pricing change.

commit_natural.prompt:
write me a commit message for this diff:
--- a/auth.py
+++ b/auth.py
@@
-    token = jwt.decode(t, verify=False)
+    token = jwt.decode(t, key, algorithms=['HS256'])

review_natural.prompt:
review this change:
--- a/pay.py
+++ b/pay.py
@@
-def charge(amt):
-    return api.post('/charge', {'amt': amt})
+def charge(amt):
+    return api.post('/charge', {'amt': amt, 'idem': None})

status_natural.prompt: give me a status update on the auth migration: I moved 3 of 5 endpoints to the new token flow. The staging secret isn't provisioned so I can't test /refresh yet.
